query:
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CAST(lb.balance_hours AS FLOAT8)), 0.0) AS "total!"
        FROM leave_balances lb
        JOIN leave_types lt ON lt.id = lb.leave_type_id AND lt.org_id = lb.org_id
        WHERE lb.org_id = $1
          AND lb.user_id = $2
          AND lt.is_active = true
          AND lt.category = ANY($3)
